sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْإِنْسَانِ أَنْ يُخَصِّصَ وَقْتًا لِلرَّاحَةِ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ طَوِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek mora posvetiti vrijeme odmoru nakon dugog dana.
sentences.translationEn: A person must dedicate time for rest after a long day.

sentences.arabic: تَقْضِي فَاطِمَةُ الْمَسَاءَ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهَا وَتَقْرَأُ كِتَابًا مُفِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Fatima provodi veče sa svojom porodicom i čita korisnu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima spends the evening with her family and reads a useful book.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ يُسَاعِدُهَا عَلَى زِيَادَةِ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Ova ravnoteža joj pomaže da poveća produktivnost ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: This balance helps her increase productivity in the morning.
